decisions.label: note
decisions.message: Deep-dive findings: (1) Agent 3 web-AoE claim for Aerial Bombs is hallucination — sim_leap correctly models smoke-landing + adjacent dmg only. (2) Agents 1&2 enemy-phase over-prediction pattern is real (~1 bldg/turn over-predicted). Cause: Grid Defense 15% not modeled in bridge/solver (only src/vision/board_scanner.py:61 declares field, unused). Fix needs 3 layers: bridge Lua expose GridShield, sim building-damage expected scaling, re-tune. Deferring.
